input.prompt: Read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. This is at /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/openslimedit-core-api-read-write-ledger-1/repo

state.output:
<task id="ses_11dd33ccbffetvZljbNh1KcLk5" state="completed">
<task_result>


I've read all 19 files. Here's a summary:

## Core Files

### src/index.ts
Main module export for Hono - exports Hono class and re-exports types from other modules.

### src/hono.ts
The `Hono` class that extends `HonoBase`. It sets up routing configuration and defaults to using `SmartRouter` with `RegExpRouter` and `TrieRouter`.

### src/hono-base.ts
The base Hono class with core functionality:
- HTTP method handlers (`get`, `post`, `put`, etc.)
- Route registration via `#addRoute()`
- Request dispatching via `#dispatch()`
- Middleware handling via `#compose()` from `compose.ts`
- `.route()`, `.basePath()`, `.mount()` methods for app composition
- Error and not-found handlers

### src/context.ts
The `Context` class with request/response lifecycle management:
- Methods like `.text()`, `.json()`, `.html()`, `.redirect()`
- `.header()`, `.status()`, `.set()`, `.get()` for request/response manipulation
- Layout rendering with `.render()` and `.setRenderer()`
- `executionCtx` and `var` properties for execution context and custom variables

### src/request.ts
The `HonoRequest` class with request handling:
- `.param()` and `.query()` for path/query parameters
- `.header()` for header values
- `.json()`, `.text()`, `.arrayBuffer()`, `.blob()`, `.formData()` for body parsing
- `.parseBody()` for form data
- `.url()`, `.method()`, `.matchedRoutes()`
- Helper function `cloneRawRequest()`

### src/request/constants.ts
Defines `GET_MATCH_RESULT` symbol for internal use.

### src/types.ts
Type definitions including:
- `Env`, `Variables`, `Input`, `Schema`
- `Handler`, `MiddlewareHandler` for handlers
- `H` type alias for handler/middleware union
- `HandlerInterface`, `MiddlewareHandlerInterface`, `OnHandlerInterface`
- Path manipulation types (`MergePath`, `MergeSchemaPath`)

### src/utils/body.ts
`parseBody()` utility for parsing request body:
- Handles `multipart/form-data` and `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`
- `parseFormData()` converts form data
- `all` option for array handling on `key[]` fields
- `dot` option for nested object parsing with dot notation

### src/compose.ts
Middleware composition function (inspired by `koa-compose`):
- Chains middleware handlers
- Handles errors via `ErrorHandler`
- Handles not-found routing via `NotFoundHandler`
- Sets `context.res` when handlers return or mark completion

## HTTP Exception

### src/http-exception.ts
`HTTPException` class for handling fatal errors:
- Takes status code (defaults to 500)
- Optional message and cause
- `getResponse()` returns the response

## Service Worker Adapter

### src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts & handler.ts
Service Worker integration:
- `fire()` registers the app with `addEventListener('fetch', handle(app))`
- `handle()` creates event handler that calls `app.fetch()`
- Falls back to `globalThis.fetch` if service worker needs it for 404s

### src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
Service Worker event types: `ExtendableEvent`, `FetchEvent`

## Client-Side Integration

### src/client/index.ts
Main export: re-exports `hc` function and types

### src/client/client.ts
`hc()` function creates a proxy-based HTTP client:
- Generates typed request methods based on the endpoint schema
- Proxy pattern allows accessing methods like `client.posts.$get().json()`
- Uses `ClientRequestImpl` to make actual requests

### src/client/types.ts
Type definitions for client:
- `ClientRequestOptions` - configuration options
- `BuildingSearchParamsFn` - custom query serialization
- `Client` - the typed client request proxy type
- `ClientResponse`, `ClientResponseOfEndpoint` - response types
- `Fetch<Endpoint>` - the fetch function type
- `hc` overload signature
- `InferRequestType`, `InferResponseType`, `InferRequestOptionsType` utilities
- `ApplyGlobalResponse` - merges global response types with app routes
- `PickResponseByStatusCode` - filters responses by status code

### src/client/utils.ts
Client utilities:
- `mergePath()` - combines base and path
- `replaceUrlParam()` - replaces `:param` in URLs
- `buildSearchParams()` - converts query records to URLSearchParams
- `replaceUrlProtocol()` - switches from http to ws
- `removeIndexString()` - removes `/index` from URLs
- `deepMerge()` - recursively merges objects
- `parseResponse()` - smart response parsing with error handling

### src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
`fetchRP()` and `DetailedError`:
- Mimics `fetch()` result handling
- Parses response body based on Content-Type
- Throws `DetailedError` if response is not ok
- `DetailedError` has detailed error information
</task_result>
</task>
state.title: Read all core API files
